name: blues
description: 12-bar blues lyric structure. Repeat the first line, answer with the second. The essay as a blues song about seeing and not seeing.
register: First person, AAB structure where natural, call and response. The dog is the one who has the answer.
rules: Jack Jack is the one who never lost the signal
The walk is walking after midnight, walking after the rain
Each section can use AAB blues structure: state the problem twice, answer it
All key numbers preserved but can be woven into lyric
The Hofstadter unit stays named exactly
The mantis shrimp section is the bridge
The coda is the last verse -- the dog at the door, the singer going home
